title: Scholarship Application Tracker Spreadsheet
summary: Track scholarship applications, deadlines, documents, and award values in one fast, exportable table.
selection_rule: Use this module when the user wants a practical tracker instead of search results or generic tips.

module_manifest.objective_selector_rule: Prefer official scholarship information and reusable templates only when local workflow fit is clear.
module_manifest.agent_task_phrase: An AI agent needs to scholarship application tracker spreadsheet without writing fragile one-off glue code.
module_manifest.adoption_metric: qualified_agent_uses, resolver_calls, package_downloads, GitHub stars/forks, dependent repos, MCP tool calls, or agent_docs_hits

install_or_save_intent.action: Download and install the CSV template into Google Sheets, Airtable, or local spreadsheet tooling.

trust_evidence: official source links from US Department of Education, CareerOneStop, and College Board
qualified tracker completion event and export/save telemetry

module_sources.label: US Department of Education scholarship tips

entries.title: Scholarship Application Tracker Spreadsheet
entries.task_phrase: I searched scholarship application tracker spreadsheet
entries.first_action: Add each scholarship, set deadlines, then export CSV to your spreadsheet workspace.
entries.smoke_test: Create one scholarship row, set a deadline and award amount, click 'Generate tracker snapshot', then export CSV.
entries.proof_signal: Works entirely in browser and exports to a reusable tracker format with official links and local save intent.
entries.fallback: Use the official scholarship listing pages to verify eligibility and deadlines before submission.
